ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the case */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/union territory where the case occurred */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "cured" INTEGER /* Number of cured cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the cases */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the cases */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the cases (e.g., district, city) */,
  "travel_history" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case has a travel history */,
  "contact_tracing" INTEGER /* Indicates if the case was identified through contact tracing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state/union territory */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state/union territory */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state/union territory */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the state/union territory */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state/union territory */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the state/union territory (latitude, longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the test belongs to */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (positive/negative) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., PCR, antigen) */,
  "testing_center" TEXT /* Testing center where the test was conducted */,
  "test_result_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_data" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the hospitalization belongs to */,
  "hospitalization_date" TEXT /* Date of hospitalization */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge (if applicable) */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital where the patient was admitted */,
  "ward" TEXT /* Ward where the patient was admitted */,
  "bed_type" TEXT /* Type of bed (e.g., general, ICU) */,
  "discharge_reason" TEXT /* Reason for discharge (e.g., cured, transferred, deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the vaccination belongs to */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of vaccination */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "vaccination_center" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "vaccination_batch" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the alert was sent to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message contents of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_status" TEXT /* Status of the dashboard (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the widget belongs to */,
  "widget_type" TEXT /* Type of widget (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "widget_status" TEXT /* Status of the widget (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "widget_description" TEXT /* Description of the widget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "widget_data" (
  "widget_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget data */,
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the widget the data belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data displayed in the widget (e.g., confirmed cases, vaccination rate) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for the widget data */,
  "data_refresh_rate" TEXT /* Refresh rate of the data (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widget_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_widget_data_widget_id FOREIGN KEY ("widget_id") REFERENCES widgets ("widget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV) */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was performed */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., security, data integrity) */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit */,
  "audit_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the audit (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
